description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has multiple jobs: format code using clang-format, build and test on ubuntu-18.04, build and test on macOS-10.14, build and test on windows-2016, and perform a semantic release. Each job depends on the format job and uses actions/checkout and specific build, test, and release steps.
